incubation.finding: Feature targets web feature 'loading-lazy-media'. This is an official WebDX feature. Problem definition depends on the spec/explainer which was not directly accessible.

prototype.finding: No public evidence of prototype-stage friction logs, API ergonomics testing, or framework integration.

wideReview.finding: Feature maps to official WebDX feature 'loading-lazy-media'. Cross-engine positions not verified in this report.

release.finding: Shipped in Chrome 147 (In developer trial (Behind a flag)).

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'LoadingLazyMedia' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 428) measured 0.0633% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2026-03-05 with 141 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the LoadingLazyMedia family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 147 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
